Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Phase 1 complete: authentication, user management, and role-based UI

- Custom branded login page \(mobile-first, Bootstrap 5, no default Django login\)
- Logout redirects to login page; forgot password stub page
- Role-based adaptive dashboard with welcome message, role badge, phase roadmap
- Role-aware sidebar navigation \(7 roles, desktop + mobile hamburger\)
- User management: list \(search/filter\), create, edit, deactivate/reactivate
- Delegated creation model: role dropdown limited to what creator can assign
- Admin password reset for Supplier Admin / Sales Manager and above
- My Profile: view, edit personal info, change own password
- Friendly 403 Access Denied page \(no raw error pages\)
- New User model fields: phone, created_by \(FK for management chain\)
- MESSAGE_TAGS configured for Bootstrap alert-danger compatibility
- Migration 0003: phone + created_by on User model
- manage.py check: 0 issues

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(git push 2>&1)

Bash(git add PRODUCT_DECISIONS.md && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Update PRODUCT_DECISIONS.md - Phase 2 design decisions, fix contradictions, phase breakdown

- Phase table: Phase 2.1 stays Complete, added Phase 2.2
  \(Sales Data Import, Item Mapping, Batch History\) and
  Phase 2.3 \(Account Conflict Detection & Merge Tool\)
- Fixed contradiction: Import Behavior and Item Mapping sections
  now correctly state that imports abort on unrecognized item
  codes — nothing written to database on abort
- Fixed contradiction: Distributors data model section updated
  to remove M2M brand relationship; now states relationship is
  derived from sales data with no explicit junction table
- Added Phase 2 — Design Decisions section covering: Brand/Item
  Management, Distributor Management, Sales Data Import,
  Account Composite Key, Duplicate Import Detection, Import Abort
  on Unknown Item Codes, Account Auto-Creation, Merged Account
  Records, Account Conflict Detection Tool, Batch Import History
- Added Active Accounts Model Manager to Deferred Features

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push origin main)

Bash(python manage.py shell -c "
from django.db import connection

with connection.cursor\(\) as cursor:
    cursor.execute\(\\"\\"\\"
        SELECT tablename 
        FROM pg_tables 
        WHERE schemaname = 'public'
        ORDER BY tablename;
    \\"\\"\\"\)
    tables = cursor.fetchall\(\)

for table in tables:
    table_name = table[0]
    with connection.cursor\(\) as cursor:
        cursor.execute\(f'SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM \\"{table_name}\\"'\)
        count = cursor.fetchone\(\)[0]
    print\(f'{table_name}: {count} records'\)
")
